notes: Generates a Cloudflare Containers deployment target, Wrangler config, and Worker entrypoint.
Defaults to private ingress so generated protected/shared deployments do not need a public domain.
Derives the container class, Durable Object binding, migration tag, and Worker entrypoint path from the deployment id.
Use --ingress_mode=public with --domain and --cloudflare_zone_id for protected/shared public ingress.
